criteria.text: Threading uses conversationIndex + RFC headers (Message-ID/In-Reply-To/References) ordered by sentDateTime, not conversationId
Conversation whose latest message is from owner and age >= 48h threshold yields one awaiting item; replies from others or younger-than-threshold excluded
Awaiting items ordered by days/hours waiting descending
DTO shape {id,hours,days,wait,to,subject,detail} preserved unchanged for EmailQueue consumer
Uses AWAITING_THRESHOLD_HOURS/AWAITING_LOOKBACK_DAYS (48/14) and owner mailbox from config
401 when unauthenticated, 502 on upstream failure, 200 + JSON array (empty when none)
Mailbox read records an audit entry (who/what+source/when/outcome) with no PHI values
Errors on the awaiting path log references/ids/paths only, never subjects/recipients/bodies
